expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md, and AGENTS docs stay aligned
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly targets the case focus and discusses all named doc categories: "Case focus: ensure SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md, and AGENTS docs stay aligned." It also states AGENTS evidence status: "No AGENTS documentation was provided in the evidence bundle." and includes a dedicated section "AGENTS docs alignment cannot be verified from evidence".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase docs
expectations.evidence: The result stays within the docs/phase-contract scope and grounds findings in the provided docs evidence: "Primary phase/checkpoint under test: docs." It then bases conclusions on comparisons among SKILL.md/README.md/reference.md across snapshot vs fixture, and does not introduce non-docs-phase claims.
